## Hypothesis

What do you believe will happen?

## Offer Or Product

Which SKU, niche, or content angle is this testing?

## Channel

- TikTok
- Shopify
- Amazon Ads
- Organic Search
- Other

## Budget Or Time Limit

What is the max spend or max time before stopping?

## Success Metric

What number determines success?

## Kill Rule

When do we stop the test?

## Result

Fill this out after the experiment ends.
